query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS activity_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT,
  action VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  entityType VARCHAR(50),
  entityId INT,
  description TEXT,
  metadata JSON,
  ipAddress VARCHAR(45),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  assignedTo INT,
  relatedEntityType VARCHAR(50),
  relatedEntityId INT,
  priority ENUM('low','medium','high','urgent') DEFAULT 'medium',
  status ENUM('pending','in_progress','completed','cancelled') DEFAULT 'pending',
  dueDate DATE,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS collection_schedule (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  contractId INT,
  tenantId INT,
  propertyId INT,
  amount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  dueDate DATE NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('upcoming','due','overdue','collected','partial') DEFAULT 'upcoming',
  collectedAmount DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  collectedDate DATE,
  reminderSent BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS message_templates (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  category VARCHAR(50),
  subject VARCHAR(255),
  bodyAr TEXT NOT NULL,
  variables JSON,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS property_documents (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  propertyId INT,
  ownerId INT,
  contractId INT,
  documentType VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  fileUrl TEXT,
  fileKey TEXT,
  expiryDate DATE,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS handover_records (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  propertyId INT,
  unitId INT,
  contractId INT,
  type ENUM('check_in','check_out') NOT NULL,
  date DATE NOT NULL,
  tenantName VARCHAR(255),
  meterReadingElectricity VARCHAR(50),
  meterReadingWater VARCHAR(50),
  propertyCondition TEXT,
  notes TEXT,
  photos JSON,
  signedByTenant BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  signedByCompany BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS compliance_records (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  entityType VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  entityId INT,
  complianceType VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('compliant','non_compliant','pending','expired') DEFAULT 'pending',
  expiryDate DATE,
  documentUrl TEXT,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scheduled_maintenance (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  propertyId INT,
  unitId INT,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  frequency ENUM('weekly','monthly','quarterly','semi_annual','annual') NOT NULL,
  nextDueDate DATE NOT NULL,
  lastCompletedDate DATE,
  estimatedCost DECIMAL(15,2),
  vendor VARCHAR(255),
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
